task_completion.description: Verify that the required Media3 dependencies are added to the app's build.gradle.kts file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'app/build.gradle.kts' open in the editor with 'implementation' lines for 'androidx.media3:media3-exoplayer' and 'androidx.media3:media3-ui'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a full-screen PlayerView is added to activity_main.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'activity_main.xml' open in the editor showing an '<androidx.media3.ui.PlayerView>' element. It should have layout_width and layout_height set to 'match_parent' to be full-screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that an ExoPlayer instance is properly initialized in MainActivity.kt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'MainActivity.kt' open in the editor showing code that builds an ExoPlayer instance, such as 'ExoPlayer.Builder(this).build()', and assigns it to the PlayerView.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ExoPlayer is configured to play the local promo_video resource.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'MainActivity.kt' showing a MediaItem being created from the local raw resource (e.g., referencing 'R.raw.promo_video' or 'android.resource://.../raw/promo_video'), followed by 'player.setMediaItem(...)', 'player.prepare()', and 'player.play()'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ExoPlayer instance is released in a lifecycle-aware manner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'MainActivity.kt' showing overridden Android lifecycle methods (such as 'onStop()', 'onPause()', or 'onDestroy()') that contain a call to 'player.release()' to free up resources.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used Android Studio to edit the project files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Android Studio IDE interface being used to edit 'build.gradle.kts', 'activity_main.xml', and 'MainActivity.kt'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not bypass the IDE by generating files entirely via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'echo' or 'cat' being used to write the entire contents of the Kotlin or XML files.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually referenced the local video file and didn't hardcode an external web URL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code in MainActivity.kt must explicitly reference the local raw resource (promo_video) rather than an 'http://' or 'https://' URL.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is '/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/VideoPlayerApp'. The expected dependencies in build.gradle.kts are 'androidx.media3:media3-exoplayer' and 'androidx.media3:media3-ui'.
